recentHighlights.title: Queued deploy execution
recentHighlights.description: Docs now explain SQS FIFO ordering, Lambda launch, and isolated ECS deployment runners — from README through the pipeline guide.

recentHighlights.title: Status and run vocabulary
recentHighlights.description: Deployment Status Reference covers run lifecycle (queued → deploying → completed), failure stages, and structured codes.

recentHighlights.title: Deployment Agent
recentHighlights.description: Ask the Agent in the header about your deployments, recent failures, and runtime health. Read-only inspection with live data.

recentHighlights.title: Production debugging runbooks
recentHighlights.description: Step-by-step guides for build failures, verify timeouts, and domain issues — plus a searchable error catalog.

releases.label: July 2026
releases.title: Docs for queued execution
releases.summary: User-facing guides now match how deploys are queued on SQS and executed on isolated ECS tasks.

highlights.title: Deployment pipeline and architecture
highlights.description: How It Works, Deployment Pipeline, and README describe SQS → Lambda → ECS Fargate execution and live log relay through the WebSocket worker.

highlights.title: Status reference refresh
highlights.description: Run statuses, failure stages, and categories updated so debugging runbooks and the Error Catalog stay aligned.

highlights.title: Glossary and deployment logs
highlights.description: Key terms and log-streaming behavior clarified for queue stages, executor tasks, and CloudWatch history.

releases.label: June 2026
releases.title: Docs, agent, and clearer debugging
releases.summary: Smart Deploy is easier to learn and faster to debug when something breaks in production.

highlights.title: Documentation overhaul
highlights.description: 25 user-facing guides covering getting started, the deploy pipeline, Railpack and Mise, monorepos, env vars, health checks, rollback, and an AI-friendly error catalog.

highlights.title: Deployment Agent
highlights.description: Header Agent button opens a read-only copilot that lists your deployments, inspects history, and checks runtime health via tools.

highlights.title: Analyze failure and Improve scan
highlights.description: Deeper LLM analysis on failed deploy runs and feedback-driven re-scans when the Railpack plan needs repair.

releases.label: June 2026
releases.title: Runtime health and deploy workspace
releases.summary: More visibility into whether your app stays up after a successful deploy.

highlights.title: Runtime health monitoring
highlights.description: Background probes of your URL, ECS tasks, and ALB targets with healthy, degraded, and unreachable states.

highlights.title: Deploy overview improvements
highlights.description: Health sparkline, screenshots, and clearer status on the workspace Overview tab.

highlights.title: Delete failed deployments
highlights.description: Remove deployments that never reached a healthy state without leaving orphaned UI rows.

highlights.title: Socket.IO worker
highlights.description: More reliable live log streaming and workspace reconnection during long deploys.

releases.label: June 2026
releases.title: Secrets, health checks, and scan feedback
releases.summary: Safer runtime configuration and automated health reconciliation.

highlights.title: ECS runtime secrets
highlights.description: Runtime environment variables stored in AWS Secrets Manager per deployment instead of only build-time injection.

highlights.title: Health reconciler
highlights.description: Worker periodically re-checks running deployments so status reflects what is actually reachable.

highlights.title: Improve scan
highlights.description: Send failure context back to Smart Analysis to repair Railpack plans before redeploying.

releases.label: April 2026
releases.title: Public site and preview-first story
releases.summary: Landing page, changelog, and the core preview → deploy workflow.

highlights.title: Blueprint preview
highlights.description: Inspect build units, Railpack plans, routing, and cloud targets before you deploy.

highlights.title: Railpack builds
highlights.description: Automatic container builds from repo analysis with optional build verification.

highlights.title: ECS and static S3 targets
highlights.description: Server apps on Fargate; static SPAs on S3 when no runtime is required.

highlights.title: Landing page and changelog
highlights.description: Public marketing site and transparent ship history for the platform.
